form.formComment: Was a winner three back at this track then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when fourth (30.73) at The Meadows. Could pose a serious challenge if finds best this time.

form.formComment: Racing well without winning, recording four minors on end, the latest hitting the ground running with a fast early sectional but finishing in the minors again when second (23.68) over 425m at this track. Some good form emerging from that last run. Among the chances.

form.formComment: Has been racing extremely well, putting three wins back-to-back. Had plenty of support last start when he won by 0.8 lengths at Horsham (23.08) beating Paw Jasta in a Grade 5 on April 9. In sparkling form and can win again.
